creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: I figured it out.  The signal handler code is helpfully restarting the syscall for me.  read(2) is actually returning to userland, but not to the stack from whence I called it.  I need to use sigaction without SA_RESTART or siginterrupt to fix it.  As is, auditd is using plain signal(), which automatically includes SA_RESTART.
